regulations.title: Norwegian Carbon Tax Extension to Fisheries and Aquaculture
regulations.summary: NOK 590/tCO2e from 2026; Bergen Fish Oils fleet ~NOK 3.2-3.4m annual liability.

regulations.title: Norwegian Pollution Control Act Amendment
regulations.summary: Temporary compliance notice granted; Norconsult feasibility study commissioned; plan due 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Reusable container pilot for EU fresh seafood exports targeted Q3 2026.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Feed supplier EUDR declarations requested; response expected Q1 2026.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: Hamburg subsidiary confirmed in-scope; KPMG Oslo DMA initiated.
